description_long: This is a single-family house surrounded by a dense cluster of snow-covered evergreen trees, creating a secluded woodland setting. The house features a gable roof with a prominent central section and attached side wings, all covered in a muted brown or tan roofing material. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely painted wood or siding, and there are multiple windows distributed across the facade, some grouped in pairs. A straight driveway leads up to the main entrance, which is slightly recessed and flanked by small shrubs or landscaping. The property is bordered on all sides by tall, conical pine trees, giving it a private and sheltered appearance. The overall design suggests a cozy, suburban or rural home with a traditional architectural style.
description: A light-colored, gable-roofed house nestled among snow-covered pine trees, with a straight driveway and multiple windows. The setting is secluded and woodland-like, evoking a cozy, traditional home.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway leading to the main entrance, flanked by snow-covered pine trees and the house facade with visible windows.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the dense row of pine trees, partially obscuring the house and revealing the side elevation and roofline.
description_view_2: Rear angled view with the house mostly surrounded by trees, showing the back and side walls and a portion of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with the driveway extending outward, the house partially visible behind a thick line of trees, and the roof and windows peeking through.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a straight driveway, flanked by landscaping and sheltered by the roof overhang.
